decision-tree.root-question: Does this vendor handle customer data, PII, or system credentials?

branch.question: Are the DPA + subprocessor list + data-flow diagram available?

branch.when: dpa_present == true AND subprocessor_list_present == true AND data_flow_present == true
branch.conclusion: Emit the assessment using `templates/vendor-risk-assessment-template.md`. Apply r1-r4 to bound scope to one vendor, type inputs, name a human owner, version + last_reviewed.

branch.when: dpa_present == false OR subprocessor_list_present == false OR data_flow_present == false
branch.conclusion: Block. Request the missing artefact from the vendor and from the internal data-flow owner before emission — untyped or absent inputs let the assessment hallucinate compliance.
Skip the assessment. Document the no-data finding in the lighter-weight procurement log; revisit if scope changes.

example.p: Datadog ingests logs (PII possible). DPA available; subprocessor list current; data-flow diagram in compliance/2026/. → conclusion r5-grounded-in-rationale → emit assessment.
